chunks.title: Invitation to the Thirsty
chunks.reason: A unified call to come for spiritual sustenance without cost.

chunks.title: Call to Repentance
chunks.reason: Direct appeals to seek God and forsake wicked ways.

chunks.title: God's Word and Ways
chunks.reason: A declaration of the superiority of God's thoughts and the efficacy of His word.

chunks.title: Joyful Restoration
chunks.reason: A prophetic vision of joy and the transformation of the land.
